solution.description: Unmanaged solution containing CCSB audit, publish, snapshot, lock, resource capability, and outbox entities.

tables.description: Keep user/team ownership. Resource capability rows are operationally close to bookable resources and should honor row-level resource stewardship.

fields.description: Stable sanitized identity for upsert and dedupe.
Domain: skill, certification, clearance, territory, facility feature, equipment, capacity, custom.
Canonical capability code used by rule matching.
Source domain: CCSB, Field Service, Project Operations, external, manual.
Optional source table logical name for adapter traceability.
Numeric proficiency score where a source uses values instead of bands.
Capability capacity contribution or allocation units.
When the capability evidence was verified.
Computed or imported final eligibility flag used by scheduling rules.
Hash of source capability input for drift checks.
Short steward notes. Keep sensitive evidence outside alternate keys.

views.name: CSB - Resource Capability - Active
views.purpose: Active audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

views.name: CSB - Resource Capability - All Records
views.purpose: All audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

tables.description: Change from Codex previous design to organization-owned. Audit evidence should not inherit a user owner that could change access or business unit behavior.

fields.description: Durable event identity, derived from operation id plus sequence.
User, team, application user, system, integration.
External principal identifier if not represented by systemuser.
Validation, command, security, publish, rollback, lock, integration, support, system.
Create, update, delete, approve, reject, publish, rollback, lock, unlock, dispatch.
Started, succeeded, failed, blocked, skipped, compensated.
Idempotency key supplied by API or worker.
Custom API, plug-in, flow, or integration operation name.
Board, version, requirement, assignment, resource, group, external.
Record id or scope key affected by the action.
Policy, user request, conflict, integration, data correction, support, system.
User-visible business reason, override reason, or support note.
UTC timestamp when the event occurred.
Rule/policy version that governed the decision.
Structured diagnostics for support, never used as the canonical business payload.
Hash of immutable event payload fields.

views.name: CSB - Operation Audit - Active
views.purpose: Active audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

views.name: CSB - Operation Audit - All Records
views.purpose: All audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

tables.description: Change from Codex previous design to organization-owned. This table is a product ledger for mutations, not personal work owned by the requester.

fields.description: Stable idempotent identity for the schedule mutation.
Create, update, delete, move, assign, unassign, split, merge, rollback, publish.
Proposed, validated, approved, committed, published, rejected, superseded, rolled back, failed.
User, API, bulk import, optimizer, external integration, rollback, system.
Source table logical name for imported or adapter-created changes.
Target record id expected to be mutated.
Concurrency value observed before the write.
Managed field list touched by the change.
Before image for managed rollback scope.
Actual committed payload if different from proposal.
Whether rollback tooling may use this change.

views.name: CSB - Schedule Change - Active
views.purpose: Active audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

views.name: CSB - Schedule Change - All Records
views.purpose: All audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

tables.description: Keep organization-owned. Snapshot items are immutable evidence, not user-owned work records.

fields.description: Schedule item, assignment, requirement, resource, lock, metadata, external projection.
Logical name of the captured table.
Row version or source version at capture time.
Fields governed by rollback and official-state comparison.
Captured payload for the managed field scope.
Optional rollback-specific image if it differs from payload.
Whether source row was deleted or absent at capture time.
Marks the item as immutable after snapshot close.

views.name: CSB - Publish Snapshot Item - Active
views.purpose: Active audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

views.name: CSB - Publish Snapshot Item - All Records
views.purpose: All audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

tables.description: Change from Codex previous design to organization-owned. A publish lock is a board protection record, not an owned personal row or worker lease.

fields.description: Stable lock identity for scope and idempotency.
Publish protection, edit freeze, rollback protection, approval hold, external dependency.
Board, version, group, resource, item, field, external.
Global board, time window, resource, requirement, assignment, external.
Timezone used to interpret business scope.
Actions blocked or allowed by the lock.
Business expiration time, not a worker heartbeat.
Correlation id across lock and publish operations.
Fast query flag for active lock views.

views.name: CSB - Publish Lock - Active
views.purpose: Active audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

views.name: CSB - Publish Lock - All Records
views.purpose: All audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

tables.description: Keep organization-owned. Outbox rows are durable integration work items and should not depend on a user owner.

fields.description: Durable event identity for idempotent delivery.
Published, changed, locked, unlocked, rollback, export, notification, integration command.
Pending, processing, delivered, failed, dead-lettered, skipped, replayed.
Message or event that caused this event.
Aggregate table for ordered event streams.
Dataverse event, Power Automate, Service Bus, Event Grid, webhook, export, internal.
Logical destination configuration key; never raw URL, token, or secret.
Transient claim timeout for delivery worker.
Transient delivery claim token, not an alternate key.
Governed reason event moved to dead letter.

views.name: CSB - Outbox Event - Active
views.purpose: Active audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

views.name: CSB - Outbox Event - All Records
views.purpose: All audit/control records ordered by most recently modified.

relationships.description: Resource capability belongs to a CCSB resource.
Audit event traces to operation header.
Audit event traces to operation item.
Audit event traces to a schedule change when applicable.
Audit event traces to a publish snapshot when applicable.
Audit event traces to a publish lock when applicable.
Schedule version affected by the change.
Snapshot that created or is protected by the lock.
Lock lineage when a later lock supersedes an earlier lock.
Board context for filtering and partitioning.
